posts.text: Down To Earth India will need Rs 25 lakh crore, sweeping reforms to achieve 100 GW nuclear... India must mobilise Rs 23-25 lakh crore and overhaul nuclear regulations to reach 100 GW capacity by 2047, TERI says. The report urges a phased mix of large reactors and SMRs, private participation, advanced fuels and regulatory reform to ensure...
